title: Essential Fabric 3.0
description: A modpack (3rd iteration) with a collection of essential mods and sane defaults.
body:
The third iteration of my 'Essential Fabric' modpack series. Contains a series of mods and resource packs that provide ample performance and quality of life improvements. 

It has relatively unopinionated defaults as not to impede player experience.

**NOTE**: Simple Voice Chat is also included, as is Xaero's worldmap and minimap. This is intended for a private server, so do not use this on Hoplite or other servers where an entity radar would provide an advantage.
